summary: Incomplete deliverable. Workflow references non-existent ./Tests (line 29) and ./fixtures (line 41) directories, causing immediate failure on run. Test harness Invoke-TestHarness.ps1 exists but is never called from workflow. Main scripts missing Set-StrictMode-Version Latest. ActionLint installed (lines 19-23) but not executed. Missing required test fixtures and act-result.txt artifact handling. Does not meet task requirements for TDD, Pester tests, or act integration.
